name: revroute-mcp
description: Manage revroute.ru short links, analytics, custom domains, customers, and affiliate / referral program from Claude.
long_description: MCP server for revroute.ru. 36 core tools (links, analytics, domains, tags, folders, customers, events, metatags, QR, workspaces, conversion tracking) plus 10 optional partner-program tools (partners, commissions, bounties, payouts) when enabled.

api_key.title: RevRoute API Key
api_key.description: Workspace API key from revroute.ru settings.

enable_partners.title: Enable partner-program tools (0 or 1)
enable_partners.description: Set to 1 to expose 10 affiliate/referral tools (partners, commissions, bounties, payouts).

tools.name: revroute_link_create
tools.description: Create a new short link.

tools.name: revroute_link_upsert
tools.description: Create or update a short link in a single call.

tools.name: revroute_link_list
tools.description: List short links with pagination and filters.

tools.name: revroute_link_get
tools.description: Retrieve a single short link by id, externalId, or domain+key.

tools.name: revroute_link_update
tools.description: Update fields on an existing short link.

tools.name: revroute_link_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete a short link. [DESTRUCTIVE]

tools.name: revroute_link_bulk_create
tools.description: Create up to 100 short links in a single request.

tools.name: revroute_link_bulk_update
tools.description: Apply the same partial update to up to 100 links.

tools.name: revroute_link_bulk_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete up to 100 short links. [DESTRUCTIVE]

tools.name: revroute_link_count
tools.description: Count short links with optional grouping by domain/tag/user.

tools.name: revroute_analytics_query
tools.description: Aggregate analytics with configurable groupBy (count, timeseries, countries, devices, top_links, utm_*, etc.).

tools.name: revroute_domain_create
tools.description: Add a custom domain to the workspace.

tools.name: revroute_domain_list
tools.description: List domains attached to the workspace.

tools.name: revroute_domain_update
tools.description: Update a domain's settings.

tools.name: revroute_domain_delete
tools.description: Remove a custom domain. [DESTRUCTIVE]

tools.name: revroute_domain_check_availability
tools.description: Check whether a domain slug is available.

tools.name: revroute_tag_create
tools.description: Create a tag for organizing short links.

tools.name: revroute_tag_list
tools.description: List tags in the workspace.

tools.name: revroute_tag_update
tools.description: Rename or recolor a tag.

tools.name: revroute_tag_delete
tools.description: Delete a tag. [DESTRUCTIVE]

tools.name: revroute_folder_create
tools.description: Create a folder for grouping links.

tools.name: revroute_folder_list
tools.description: List folders in the workspace.

tools.name: revroute_folder_update
tools.description: Rename a folder or change access level.

tools.name: revroute_folder_delete
tools.description: Delete a folder. [DESTRUCTIVE]

tools.name: revroute_customer_create
tools.description: Create a customer record linked to an externalId.

tools.name: revroute_customer_list
tools.description: List customers in the workspace.

tools.name: revroute_customer_get
tools.description: Retrieve a customer by id or externalId.

tools.name: revroute_customer_update
tools.description: Update fields on an existing customer.

tools.name: revroute_customer_delete
tools.description: Delete a customer record. [DESTRUCTIVE]

tools.name: revroute_event_list
tools.description: List raw click/lead/sale events with filters.

tools.name: revroute_metatags_get
tools.description: Fetch og:title / og:description / og:image for a URL.

tools.name: revroute_qr_generate
tools.description: Generate a QR code PNG for any URL (returned inline as base64).

tools.name: revroute_workspace_get
tools.description: Look up workspaces accessible by the API key.

tools.name: revroute_track_lead
tools.description: Record a lead conversion event. Billable, real-data only. [DESTRUCTIVE]

tools.name: revroute_track_sale
tools.description: Record a sale conversion event. Billable, real-data only. [DESTRUCTIVE]

tools.name: revroute_ping
tools.description: Health-check tool. Returns server version and config without calling the upstream API.
